word: G1356 - διοπετής - diopetḗs - dee-op-et'-ace - Which fell down from Jupiter

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Which fell down from Jupiter
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the alternate of G2203 and the alternate of G4098; sky fallen (that is, an aerolite): - which fell down from Jupiter.
